rules.focus: bass pulses bending the wet reflections
guitar-like neon lines cutting through the shadows
layered voice trails orbiting the character
distant reverb halos dissolving behind the prop
piano-key light strips rising from the floor
rain streaks refracting neon into scattered points
fractured mirror planes revealing emotion fragments
crowd silhouettes dissolving into background light
star-shaped light points drifting down around the figure
cyber-pink mist rising slowly through the scene
ember sparks rising into the neon frame
a glowing screen reflection crossing the character's face
neon-edged petals dissolving at the frame edges
a frozen clock shadow stretched across wet pavement
a single light beam splitting into spectrum fragments
wind-driven light threads crossing the silhouette
the protagonist's shadow elongated and glowing at its edges
waveform-shaped neon traces floating beside the figure
